area_description: Personalization (P13N) in LLMs focuses on adapting model behavior to individual users' preferences, needs, and contexts.

categories.name: Conversational Personalization
categories.description: Adapting the model's behavior to the user's conversational style, preferences, and context, generating personalized responses based on user history and profiles.

sub_topics.name: RAG-based Personalization
sub_topics.description: Retrieving relevant memories from the user's history, including logs and multi-modal memory, to generate personalized responses.

sub_topics.name: User-Profile Based Personalization
sub_topics.description: Learning user profiles, which can be text-based or embedding-based, and using them to generate personalized responses.

categories.name: Recommendation Personalization
categories.description: Recommending a list of items to the user, ranking items based on their preferences, using LLM-based approaches, LLM signals, and diversity strategies.

sub_topics.name: LLM-based Recommendation
sub_topics.description: Using LLMs directly for recommendation through prompt-based methods, post-training fine-tuning or RL, and generative recommendation with mid-training for sequential and contrastive learning.

sub_topics.name: Leveraging LLM Signals
sub_topics.description: Enhancing existing recommendation techniques using LLM-generated signals including item and user descriptions, embeddings, and synthetic training data.

sub_topics.name: Recommendation Diversity and Serendipity
sub_topics.description: Ensuring recommendation results are diverse and can include related but surprising items to enhance user experience.

categories.name: User Modeling
categories.description: Building user models that capture preferences and interests, using text profiles, embedding profiles, or graph and concept-net based profiles, orthogonal to specific personalization tasks.

sub_topics.name: Text Profiles
sub_topics.description: User profiles represented as text summaries of user preferences, interests, and behavioral patterns.

sub_topics.name: Embedding Profiles
sub_topics.description: User profiles represented as dense vector embeddings capturing user preferences in a continuous latent space.

sub_topics.name: Graph and Concept-Net Profiles
sub_topics.description: User profiles structured as graphs or concept networks, capturing interesting concepts and their relationships that represent user interests.

theme.name: Analysis
theme.description: Papers where experiments are conducted to evaluate the performance of baseline solutions, showing gaps and future directions.

theme.name: Benchmark
theme.description: Papers that introduce new benchmark datasets and evaluation metrics.

theme.name: Application
theme.description: Papers that show how to apply the techniques to a specific domain or task, highlighting its strengths and gaps.

theme.name: Survey
theme.description: Papers that provide a comprehensive overview of the current state of the art, including its taxonomy, advantages and limitations.
